name: Bill Rank
abstract: William C. Rank (June 8, 1904 – May 20, 1979) was an American jazz trombonist.

concerts.label: New York Jazz Repertory Company: The Music of Bix Beiderbecke
Newport Jazz Festival: New York Jazz Repertory Company

about_quotes.speaker: Loren M. "Tex" Brewster
about_quotes.evidence: Bill Rank yeah yeah I guess I got to hear him play once you did? he was playing trombone when I heard him yeah I believe it was just that one time I heard him

about_quotes.speaker: Spiegle Willcox and Al Gallodoro
about_quotes.evidence: But see now the Goldkette band was in 1925 so the first year I made a hundred, Bill Rank, he made a hundred
about_quotes.doc_title: Spiegle Willcox and Al Gallodoro interviewed by Monk Rowe, Norwich, New York, November 14, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Chauncey Morehouse
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] All right, in '26 you still had Spiegel, Wilcox, Bill Rank, Doc Ryker, Jimmy Dorsey.
